meta_title: For Founders: SaaS pricing to Solve no coding experience (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS Pricing for No-Code AI Builders
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing without coding experience. A high-impact checklist for AI founders using Antigravity and Claude Code to drive revenue and growth.
content.answer_block: Overcoming the lack of coding experience starts by leveraging AI-native development tools. By integrating Antigravity for rapid UI deployment and Claude Code for backend logic, you can implement dynamic SaaS pricing models that scale. Focus on value-based tiering to validate your product and maximize recurring revenue from day one.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have a vision for a transformative AI tool, but the technical barrier feels like an impenetrable wall. You’re watching competitors launch while you’re stuck debugging concepts, and the fear of missing the market window is keeping you up at night.

But here is the secret: you don't need a computer science degree to build a profitable SaaS. You need a systematic approach to automation. By combining the rapid prototyping power of Antigravity with the logic-engine of Claude Code, you can translate business requirements into revenue-generating code in hours, not months.

steps.title: Define Value-Based Pricing Tiers
steps.description: Stop guessing. Use Claude Code to analyze competitor pricing structures and recommend three tiers—Starter, Pro, and Enterprise—based on feature gating.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pricing component UI with three cards: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise. Include a toggle for monthly/yearly billing and 'Buy Now' buttons.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze industry-standard pricing for AI SaaS and output a tiered JSON configuration for my app.'

steps.title: Build the Logic Layer
steps.description: Implement the backend logic that restricts access based on the user's subscription status using Claude Code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function that checks a user's subscription tier before allowing access to the API generation endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Create a middleware.ts file that validates user subscription status against a Stripe API mock.'

steps.title: Integrate Payment Infrastructure
steps.description: Connect your application to Stripe to handle subscriptions seamlessly without writing manual payment flows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe checkout session handler that redirects users based on their selected pricing tier.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Initialize Stripe SDK and create a checkout session endpoint for the pricing tiers defined in step 1.'

steps.title: Deploy the MVP Pricing Page
steps.description: Launch the pricing page to your production environment to start testing conversion rates immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the pricing component to be fully responsive, mobile-optimized, and styled with a professional SaaS aesthetic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Deploy the current codebase to Vercel and verify the pricing page accessibility.'

steps.title: Enable Automated Analytics
steps.description: Hook your pricing interactions into an analytics tool to track which tier is the most popular.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add event tracking to the 'Buy Now' buttons that pushes data to a basic analytics dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Add PostHog tracking events to all pricing button clicks for conversion analysis.'

pro_tips: Always start with a 'Free Trial' rather than a 'Freemium' model to force early user commitment and higher conversion.
Use Claude Code to generate 'Unit Tests' for your pricing logic; if the math fails, your revenue fails.
Implement 'Feature Gating' in the UI so users see what they are missing, creating psychological pressure to upgrade.
A/B test your pricing labels (e.g., 'Pro' vs 'Growth') every 14 days to identify the highest psychological trigger.
Always include a 'Contact Us' link on the Enterprise tier to capture high-ticket leads that automation cannot close.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing is live, focus on driving 100 users to the site. Analyze the friction points in the checkout flow using your new analytics, and iterate on your messaging based on actual user feedback.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the strategy. Now you need the execution. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' time and start turning your AI vision into a revenue-generating asset today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
